features: [Speed Dial] Uvital Landline provides 9 one-touch memory keys. They can store home numbers, and when contacting loved ones, you can pick up the handset and press the M key to connect, it makes calling very fast and convenient.

[Easy to Use] Corded operation, line power mode, support Hands-free, last number redial, Volume control and flash. Please adjust the volume according to your personal needs to make your calls with your family more convenient and enjoyable.
[Simple and Friendly Feature] The landline is designed with a prominent SOS button, which makes it easy for you to seek professional help in an emergency.

[Volume Control] Support ringtone volume control and handset volume control, the volume can be adjusted by sliding, designed for the elderly and the hearing impaired, the signal is stable and the call is clear.

[Durable] Always keep in mind the high-quality performance to ensure excellent reliability, while the environmentally friendly and durable ABS plastic shell material protects your health, please contact us if you have any questions about functionality and usage.
description: Product Description If I answer the phone with a receiver, can it be changed to hands-free? Long press the hands-free button, put the receiver back into the cradle. After it's placed, release the HF button and you can use the hands-free mode. Can the ringtone be adjusted? The ringtone button on the back of the landline base can control the volume of the ringtone or turn it off. How can I save my Grandma's number on it? 1. Pick up the receiver, press STORE button, enter thephone number you want to store 2. Press STORE button again, press one of (1-9 photomemories ) or(O-9) buttons for number location 3. Put the receiver back into the cradle
